name: update-article-content-template
description: Updates the Article ContentTemplate (node.article.full) with an exposed slot for per-content editing. Restructures the template tree: keeps Heading (linked to title) and Image (linked to field_image) as root-level template-locked components, adds a Wrapper component whose 'content' slot is configured as the exposed slot, and removes the static Paragraph component (body content belongs in per-entity slot).
preconditions: Active default theme SDC components (wrapper, heading, image) are available
